title: Lanostry's armor stands
description: improved armor stands made of different materials
body:
## **📜 Description**

This resourcepack includes more than 16 variants of new armor stands (more to come in the future), including all kinds of vanilla wood and some other materials
In vanilla minecraft the armor stand will not have arms, but will have “shoulders”, to get a version with arms you need to use command blocks or install quark mod.
The stands have a slim version of the arms so that you can use the modified armor with slim arms
you can get any armor stand just by spawning them randomly (like paintings), or by renaming the armor stand or nametag on the anvil
A list of all renames can be found inside the resourcepack

## **🌻 Recommendations**

Use optifine or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [CEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) to run the resourcepack

Resourcepacks with new armor stands models are not compatible with player copies from quark

If you are using EMF and ETF, be prepared for armor stands to display incorrectly inside the GUI, such as in the blacksmith's table

## **👺 Terms of use**

I forbid you to use my resourcepacks/mods for commercial purposes, to use them in third-party projects, paid modpacks, on public servers with paid pass or donation, as well as to distribute them on other sites
It is also forbidden to use textures from my projects for training neural networks
If you want to use my projects in your modpacks, you must credit me as the author and share a portion of the revenue from downloads
For other uses (videos, articles, etc.), please provide a link to the download (modrinth or curseforge)
All of this works with the full or modified package, as well as if you use only part of the content

## **🦉 Community**

[![Lanostry's discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37e5697386e285f1afe56ca77abec85d2983d802.png)](https://discord.gg/mThvczzpuV)
